decisions: \Consolidated dependencies into Version Catalog (libs.versions.toml)\\, \\Unified ViewUtils dpToPx and TimeUtils formatTime helper\\, \\Extracted hardcoded Thai UI strings to strings.xml across all activities\\, \\Corrected audio thread priorities to run inside background thread contexts to prevent UI thread starvation\\, \\Implemented onTrimMemory and onLowMemory memory reclamation in FloatingWidgetService\\, \\Simplified Activity back-pressed callback logic using direct finish() and handleBackPress()\\, \\Optimized overlay widget pulse animation to run only during Active streaming\\, \\Verified clean build and successfully ran all 80+ unit tests\\]
objective: Consolidate codebase redundancy, migrate dependencies to catalog, extract Thai UI strings, fix UI starvation, optimize memory, simplify onBackPressed, and optimize overlay animation
title: Refactoring, localization, thread priority, and overlay animation optimization
